leadText: The Iceroot Carrot (Japanese: つめたいにんじん Icy Carrot) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Iceroot Carrot allows the player to summon Glastrier at the Crown Shrine .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests' beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a field covered in snow.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Iceroot Carrot allows the player to summon Glastrier at the Crown Shrine . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests' beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a field covered in snow. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh CT Snowslide Slope (if the player plants the Carrot Seeds in the area's crop plots)
